zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Stowell於1422年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同時，他的父親Walter Stowell19歲，母親Joan Farway18歲。他於大約1438年與Elizabeth Wadham在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1499年10月28日在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可瑟爾斯同聖 多馬 本 康特波也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Stowell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stowell (Somerset), Stowell (Gloucestershire), East and West Stowell in Wilcot (Wiltshire), or Stawell (Somerset), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’. The surname was taken to the Isle of Man by 1511, from whence it migrated to Lancashire and Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Stowell was born in 1422, in Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Stowell, was 19 and his mother, Joan Farway, was 18. He married Elizabeth Wadham about 1438, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 October 1499, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Wadham environ 1438, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1499, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à St Thomas Of Canterbury's Church, Cothelstone, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Stowell(이)가 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 컷헬스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Stowell(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Farway(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Elizabeth Wadham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1499년 10월 28일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 컷헬스톤 스트 톰아스 프 캉르버이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wadham aproximadamente 1438, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Church of Saint Thomas of Canterbury, Co: ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Stowell родился в 1422 г. в местности котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Stowell было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Farway, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wadham около 1438 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 октября 1499 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности ст томас оф кантирбури'с чурч, котелстоун, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
